subject: This Friday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
We’ll fly you to Washington D.C. for Inauguration. |

Friend, Want a front row seat to witness history? Cancel your Friday plans. In just 3 days, the nation will be watching as Donald J. Trump is sworn in as the 45th President of the United States. Together, we started a movement that is going to Make America Great Again! This is your last chance to be a part of this historic day. Contribute $3 or more to be automatically entered to win a once-in-a-lifetime trip to Washington, D.C. for inauguration this weekend. You don’t want to miss out on this. Enter now before it is too late. See you there! Team TRUMP P.S. This is your last chance to enter to win a trip to Washington D.C. this Friday to witness history as President-elect Donald J. Trump is sworn in as our 45th president. And remember, we’ll cover your airfare and hotel, so contribute $3 or more to enter before it’s too late.
ENTER NOW

NO PURCHASE, PAYMENT, OR CONTRIBUTION NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN. Contributing will not improve your chances of winning. Void where prohibited. You may enter by contributing to Trump Make America Great Again by clicking here. Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by clicking here. Entries must be received between January 5, 2016 at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time and ends on January 18, 2016 at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) winner will receive the following Prize: Round trip airfare for the winner and one guest to Washington, D.C., hotel accommodations for two (2) nights for the winner and one guest and ground transportation at the discretion of Sponsor (approximate retail value $3,000). In addition, although the Presidential Swearing-In Ceremony is not part of the official prize package, Trump Make America Great Again Committee will have access to tickets. The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winner must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit here for full details and Official Rules. Sponsor: Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor, Beverly, MA 01915. This Sweepstakes is not affiliated with the 58th Presidential Inaugural Committee.
Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.
Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee.
Unsubscribe Or unsubscribe by email

Contribute $3 or more to be automatically entered to win a once-in-a-lifetime trip to Washington, D.C. for inauguration this weekend.

name: Democrats.org
subject: re: the most corrupt administration in history
body:
Help prevent corruption in the Trump administration
---
**Trump's business interests present an unprecedented, unethical conflict of interest with his presidency. Pitch in to help us fight back against corruption in the Trump administration:

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c043/4067b0a/230a9601e/7e78397e/1791843811/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "http://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170117_ew_nd&source=em_20170117_ew_nd")**
Friend --

I have to agree with Democratic Senator Sherrod Brown: "An administration with personal financial interests that compete against American interests is ripe for corruption."

We expect our presidents to place what's best for the country at the forefront of every decision they make. But when Donald Trump enters the Oval Office, his first priority will be his own bottom line.

Trump's decision not to divest from his businesses means that regulation of his hotels, airplanes, golf courses, and apartment buildings will be overseen by people whose job security comes from the White House. And since he won't release his tax returns, there's no real way for the American people to know where the list of potential conflicts of interest ends.

Here's one thing I know: even though we're still a few days from his inauguration, there's already a mountain of evidence that proves without any doubt that we can't trust Donald Trump.

Our work to keep Donald Trump from running the most corrupt administration in our history has already started. Pitch in $3 or whatever you can now to help us keep going.

**If you've saved your payment information, your donation will go through immediately.

**[QUICK DONATE: $3](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c043/4067b0a/230a9601e/7e78397f/1791843811/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+QUICK+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20170117_ew_nd&source=em_20170117_ew_nd")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c043/4067b0a/230a9601e/7e78397c/1791843811/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20170117_ew_nd&source=em_20170117_ew_nd")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c043/4067b0a/230a9601e/7e78397d/1791843811/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20170117_ew_nd&source=em_20170117_ew_nd")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c043/4067b0a/230a9601e/7e78397a/1791843811/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20170117_ew_nd&source=em_20170117_ew_nd")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c043/4067b0a/230a9601e/7e78397b/1791843811/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20170117_ew_nd&source=em_20170117_ew_nd")**

**Or donate another amount:**

**[https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c043/4067b0a/230a9601e/7e783978/1791843811/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+httpsmydemocratsorgHelpDemocratsFightBac&utm_campaign=em_20170117_ew_nd&source=em_20170117_ew_nd")**

** Thanks,

Eric

Eric Walker
Deputy Communications Director
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c043/4067b0a/230a9601e/7e783979/1791843811/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170117_ew_nd&source=em_20170117_ew_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c043/4067b0a/230a9601e/7e783906/1791843811/VEsP/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170117_ew_nd&source=em_20170117_ew_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c043/4067b0a/230a9601e/7e783907/1791843811/VEsHBQ/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170117_ew_nd&source=em_20170117_ew_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c043/4067b0a/230a9601e/7e783904/1791843811/VEsHBA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170117_ew_nd&source=em_20170117_ew_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

name: Brice Barnes
subject: fwd -- Obamacare REPEALED?!?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
This is BAD news Did you see this? We can't stop defending Obamacare:

**Begin Original Message:** ALERT: The GOP JUST voted to repeal Obamacare!
**[SIGN ON: Tell the GOP to stop dismantling Obamacare!>>](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4b3ff/1a5213b3/7545fa17/718bc26a/1974707894/VEsH/ "http://petitions.signforgood.com/trumpobamacare?code=FDP2&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fcontribute%2Fpage%2Ffdp-save-obamacare%3Frefcode%3Dem011317%26amount%3D10.00%26recurring%3D12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=1+-+SIGN+ON+Tell+the+GOP+to+stop+dismantling&utm_campaign=em011717&source=em011717")** In the dead of night Wednesday, Senate Republicans started the process to dismantle Obamacare.

**NOW, the House JUST voted to do the same.**

Listen, we can't stand by, and that's why we need you.

**[ADD YOUR NAME: Tell the GOP to stop dismantling Obamacare!](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4b3ff/1a5213b3/7545fa17/718bc265/1974707894/VEsE/ "http://petitions.signforgood.com/trumpobamacare?code=FDP2&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fcontribute%2Fpage%2Ffdp-save-obamacare%3Frefcode%3Dem011317%26amount%3D10.00%26recurring%3D12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=2+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME+Tell+the+GOP+to+stop+disma&utm_campaign=em011717&source=em011717")**

Trump and the GOP have NO PLAN to replace Obamacare, but they are determined to repeal key measures like:
* Ensuring you can get coverage if you have pre-existing conditions
* Allowing children under 26 to stay on family plans
* Keeping contraceptive coverage

**[This is reckless and dangerous. That's why we need you to join us and say NO to the GOP's efforts to destroy Obamacare!](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4b3ff/1a5213b3/7545fa17/718bc264/1974707894/VEsF/ "http://petitions.signforgood.com/trumpobamacare?code=FDP2&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fcontribute%2Fpage%2Ffdp-save-obamacare%3Frefcode%3Dem011317%26amount%3D10.00%26recurring%3D12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=3+-+This+is+reckless+and+dangerous+Thatrsquo&utm_campaign=em011717&source=em011717")**

Thanks,

Florida Democrats

---

| Paid for by Florida Democratic Party. Not Authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
---

We believe that emails are a vital way for the campaign to stay in direct contact with supporters. Click [**here**](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4b3ff/1a5213b3/7545fa17/718bc267/1974707894/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZQUWtaVlUwTkJWRVZFVWtWRFNWQkpSVTVVU1VRbEpRPT0iOiI3NTQ1ZmExNyIsIkpTVlBRa1pWVTBOQlZFVkVUVUZKVEVsT1IxTkZUa1JKUkNVbCI6Ijc3YjRiM2ZmIn0=/ "http://act.floridadems.org/page/oneclickunsubscribe/7545fa17/77b4b3ff?utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em011717&source=em011717") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages.

Thanks for your support of Florida Democrats!.

Contributions or gifts to the Florida Democratic Party are not tax deductible.

name: Donna Brazile
subject: Become a card-carrying member of the party that's standing up to Trump
body:
Get your Official Democratic Membership Card today
---
**The fight against Trump and the GOP's extreme agenda starts right now. Chip in $10 or whatever you can to support Democrats and get your Official Democratic Membership Card:

** **[GET YOUR CARD](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c05b/4067b0a/2307c9eea/7e782687/2958840954/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "http://my.democrats.org/2017-Membership1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+GET+YOUR+CARD&utm_campaign=em_20170117_db_nd&source=em_20170117_db_nd")**
Friend --

We're kicking off our 2017 Democratic membership drive today, and there's never been a more important time to become a card-carrying member of this party.

**[Take this opportunity to be one of the first to reserve your Official 2017 Membership Card.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c05b/4067b0a/2307c9eea/7e782684/2958840954/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/2017-Membership1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Take+this+opportunity+to+be+one+of+the+f&utm_campaign=em_20170117_db_nd&source=em_20170117_db_nd")**

The past couple weeks have shown us how far the GOP will go to repeal the Affordable Care Act, and how they're willing to take health care away from millions of Americans to score a political victory.

We've seen Republican senators fall in line behind Cabinet nominees who are unqualified for the job -- if they even know what the job is.

We learned new details about Russia's attack on our democracy that boosted Trump to victory.

We heard Trump's blueprint for profiting off of his presidency and making his administration the most corrupt in American history.

And all before Trump even takes the Oath of Office.

Your Official 2017 Membership Card will be concrete proof that you stood up to Trump from the very beginning -- something you can be proud to carry with you and show that you're part of the resistance for the next few years.

Chip in $10 or more today, and we'll send you yours.

**If you've saved your payment information, your donation will go through immediately.

**[QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c05b/4067b0a/2307c9eea/7e782685/2958840954/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/2017-Membership1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20170117_db_nd&source=em_20170117_db_nd")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c05b/4067b0a/2307c9eea/7e782682/2958840954/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/2017-Membership1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20170117_db_nd&source=em_20170117_db_nd")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c05b/4067b0a/2307c9eea/7e782683/2958840954/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/2017-Membership1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20170117_db_nd&source=em_20170117_db_nd")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c05b/4067b0a/2307c9eea/7e782680/2958840954/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/2017-Membership1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20170117_db_nd&source=em_20170117_db_nd")**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c05b/4067b0a/2307c9eea/7e78268f/2958840954/VEsP/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170117_db_nd&source=em_20170117_db_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c05b/4067b0a/2307c9eea/7e78268c/2958840954/VEsHBQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170117_db_nd&source=em_20170117_db_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c05b/4067b0a/2307c9eea/7e78268d/2958840954/VEsHBA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170117_db_nd&source=em_20170117_db_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c05b/4067b0a/2307c9eea/7e78268a/2958840954/VEsHBw/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170117_db_nd&source=em_20170117_db_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.
clean_body: Get your Official Democratic Membership Card today The fight against Trump and the GOP's extreme agenda starts right now. Chip in $10 or whatever you can to support Democrats and get your Official Democratic Membership Card: "" Friend -- We're kicking off our 2017 Democratic membership drive today, and there's never been a more important time to become a card-carrying member of this party. "" The past couple weeks have shown us how far the GOP will go to repeal the Affordable Care Act, and how they're willing to take health care away from millions of Americans to score a political victory. We've seen Republican senators fall in line behind Cabinet nominees who are unqualified for the job -- if they even know what the job is. We learned new details about Russia's attack on our democracy that boosted Trump to victory. We heard Trump's blueprint for profiting off of his presidency and making his administration the most corrupt in American history. And all before Trump even takes the Oath of Office. Your Official 2017 Membership Card will be concrete proof that you stood up to Trump from the very beginning -- something you can be proud to carry with you and show that you're part of the resistance for the next few years. Chip in $10 or more today, and we'll send you yours. If you've saved your payment information, your donation will go through immediately. "" "" "" "" "" Or donate another amount: "" Thanks, Donna Donna Brazile Chair Democratic National Committee Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.
